D4<div>- zero out low nibble of packed data (in D3)</div><div>- divide D3 by 0x20</div><div>- load address bdfc for index masking (into A3)</div><div>- use D3 as an index from bdfc, write the mask into D6</div><div>- zero out high nibble of packed data in D4</div><div>- multiply D4 by 0x20</div><div>- load adderss be3c for index masking (into A3)</div><div>- use D4 as an index from be3c, write the mask into D6</div>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1050" y="1610" width="180" height="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell div.div:
- load address bdbc for indexed masking (into A3)
- compute the index by multiplying the low byte of D2 by 0x20
- move the appropriate mask into D5

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 917px; margin-left: 451px;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1217px; margin-left: 452px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- copy byte of packed data (D3) into D4
- zero out low nibble of packed data (in D3)
- divide D3 by 0x20
- load address bdfc for index masking (into A3)
- use D3 as an index from bdfc, write the mask into D6
- zero out high nibble of packed data in D4
- multiply D4 by 0x20
- load adderss be3c for index masking (into A3)
- use D4 as an index from be3c, write the mask into D6
